topIngredients.name: Magnesium Ascorbyl Phosphate 10%
topIngredients.benefit: Stable vitamin C that brightens without irritation

topIngredients.name: Niacinamide
topIngredients.benefit: Fades hyperpigmentation and evens skin tone

verdict: MAP 10% is the ideal vitamin C for sensitive skin types who cannot tolerate pure ascorbic acid. Slower-acting but highly stable formula with an excellent safety record.
